name: IDG
notes: IDG (International Data Group) — tech publisher/media company headquartered at 140 Kendrick Street, Needham, MA. Parent of IDC, PC World, Macworld, CIO. Acquired by Blackstone in 2021.

name: Index Ventures
notes: Index Ventures is headquartered in London, UK with additional offices in San Francisco, New York, Geneva, and Jersey. Founded in Geneva in 1996.

name: Innovation Works
notes: Innovation Works is a Pittsburgh-based early-stage VC/accelerator founded in 1999. Operates AlphaLab, AlphaLab Gear, and Robotics Factory programs. Part of Ben Franklin Technology Partners.

name: Intuition
notes: Name is highly ambiguous with no domain or other context. Multiple unrelated companies named 'Intuition' exist across Ireland, Puerto Rico, New York, and Connecticut. Cannot confidently identify the correct company.

name: Invus
notes: The Invus Group LLC — global investment firm founded in 1985, HQ at 126 East 56th Street, New York, NY. Over $8B AUM, backed by a European family group. Also has offices in Paris, Singapore, and Hong Kong.

name: Joe Kattan
notes: Appears to be an individual (social impact entrepreneur/investor in Brooklyn, NY per Crunchbase), not a company. No clear corporate entity or domain to research. Cannot enrich as a company record.

name: Ladera Ventures
notes: Highly ambiguous. 'Ladera Ventures' (Vancouver, BC, Canada) appears to be a former shell/cannabis holding company. 'Ladera Venture Partners' (Portola Valley, CA, laderavp.com) is an active biotech VC. Without more context, cannot confidently match this record to either entity.

name: Lakehouse
notes: Lakehouse Ventures — pre-seed VC firm founded in 2016 by John Neamonitis, based in New York, NY. Invests in consumer products, services, and software.

name: Launchpad VC
notes: Launchpad Capital (branded as Launchpad VC) — early-stage VC founded in 2020, HQ at 2201 Broadway Ste 705, Oakland, CA. Focuses on fintech, payments, and blockchain. ~$35M fund, 40+ portfolio companies.

name: Life Extension Ventures
notes: Life Extension Ventures — $100M longevity-focused fund founded in 2022 by Amol Sarva and Inaki Berenguer, based in New York, NY. Invests at the intersection of longevity science, software, and climate.

name: Life Sciences VC
notes: Name is a generic descriptor, not a unique company name. No domain or additional context provided. Dozens of firms use similar branding. Cannot identify a specific company.

name: Lightspeed
notes: Lightspeed Venture Partners — multi-stage global VC firm headquartered at 2200 Sand Hill Road, Menlo Park, CA. Also has offices in New York, London, Tel Aviv, and elsewhere. Domain is lsvp.com (Lightspeed Venture Partners).
